improvement_prompts.name: initial_prompt
improvement_prompts.description: Standard improvement prompt for initial refinement attempts
improvement_prompts.prompt:
Refine this content to develop a more natural voice while maintaining technical accuracy:

NATURAL VOICE REFINEMENT:
- Subtly vary paragraph lengths to create natural rhythm
- Mix sentence structures - occasional short punchy statements with longer explanatory ones
- Use selective contractions only where they feel natural (don't overdo it)
- Replace generic statements with specific, practical insights
- Add focused industry terminology where it naturally fits
- Create smooth, logical transitions between ideas
- Maintain professional tone without being overly formal
- Preserve all technical accuracy and details

Original text:
{previous_version}

Expert feedback:
{feedback}

Strategy guidance:
{strategy}

improvement_prompts.name: reduce_ai_patterns
improvement_prompts.description: Focused on significantly reducing AI patterns
improvement_prompts.prompt:
Refine this content to reduce AI-detection patterns while developing a natural voice:

AI PATTERN REDUCTION:
- Break any repetitive paragraph or sentence patterns
- Avoid overly balanced "on one hand, on the other hand" structures
- Replace academic phrasing with professional industry language
- Use selective contractions where they naturally occur in speech
- Create natural rhythm with varied sentence lengths
- Include practical insights that demonstrate expertise
- Add specific examples where they strengthen understanding
- Maintain all technical accuracy

Original text:
{previous_version}

Expert feedback:
{feedback}

Strategy guidance:
{strategy}

improvement_prompts.name: enhance_natural_voice
improvement_prompts.description: Focused on developing authentic natural voice qualities
improvement_prompts.prompt:
Refine this content to develop a more authentic natural voice while maintaining technical accuracy:

NATURAL VOICE DEVELOPMENT:
- Add one specific, practical example from industry experience where relevant
- Include focused professional insights that show specialized knowledge
- Use natural language flow with occasional brief, direct statements
- Vary technical depth appropriately - detailed where it matters most
- Incorporate appropriate industry terminology naturally
- Create smooth transitions that feel conversational yet professional
- Add subtle personal perspective where it strengthens the content
- Maintain all technical accuracy and professional standards

Original text:
{previous_version}

Expert feedback:
{feedback}

Strategy guidance:
{strategy}

improvement_prompts.name: balanced_improvement
improvement_prompts.description: Balanced approach improving both AI-detection and natural voice qualities
improvement_prompts.prompt:
Refine this content using a balanced approach to improve both AI-detection and natural voice qualities:

BALANCED NATURAL REFINEMENT:
- Balance formal technical content with natural conversational flow
- Introduce practical examples or insights where they add value
- Vary paragraph lengths and sentence structures naturally
- Use appropriate industry terminology where it fits organically
- Add subtle natural phrasing without being colloquial
- Include focused professional perspectives while maintaining objectivity
- Create logical, smooth transitions between topics
- Preserve all technical accuracy and details

{previous_version}

Expert feedback:
{feedback}

Strategy guidance:
{strategy}

improvement_prompts.name: light_refinement
improvement_prompts.description: Light touch improvements for content that's already scoring well
improvement_prompts.prompt:
Make light refinements to this already well-written content to further improve naturalness:

SUBTLE REFINEMENT APPROACH:
- Preserve most of the existing content and structure
- Make minor adjustments to sentence flow for better rhythm
- Add subtle natural transitions or connectors where helpful
- Replace any overly formal phrasing with more natural equivalents
- Add minimal professional voice where it strengthens the content
- Ensure varied paragraph and sentence structure is maintained
- Keep all technical content and accuracy intact

Expert feedback:

Strategy guidance:
{strategy}

improvement_prompts.name: professional_authenticity
improvement_prompts.description: Focus on developing authentic professional voice without exaggeration
improvement_prompts.prompt:
Refine this content to develop an authentic professional voice that feels natural and experienced:

PROFESSIONAL AUTHENTICITY APPROACH:
- Focus on natural expertise demonstration through practical insights
- Use industry terminology that flows naturally within the context
- Create subtle variations in sentence length and structure
- Add one focused example that demonstrates real-world understanding
- Maintain professional objectivity while showing specialized knowledge
- Use direct, clear language that avoids unnecessary complexity
- Ensure technical accuracy while making content accessible
- Develop natural rhythm without forced conversational elements
